forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: No material change; Metaculus at 31% by 2030, industry optimism stable but no breakthroughs
forecasts.base_rate: Metaculus community: 31% by 2030; combined forecast platforms: median 2031

factors_up.factor: Major labs investing heavily with explicit AGI targets
Rapid capability gains in agentic AI during 2025-26
Stanford researchers predict AGI within 3 years

factors_down.factor: No consensus definition of AGI; moving goalposts likely
Scaling laws showing diminishing returns on some benchmarks

key_uncertainties: Whether current transformer architectures can achieve AGI
Definition disputes may prevent clear resolution

update_triggers.up: Major lab announces system passing comprehensive AGI benchmarks
update_triggers.down: Evidence of fundamental plateau in reasoning capabilities

forecasts.question: Will economic consultancy lose ≥33% value/jobs by end 2030 due to AI?
forecasts.key_change: Slight uptick: McKinsey laid off 200, Accenture cutting 11k; AI agents replacing junior consultant work, but 33% decline still a very high bar
forecasts.base_rate: No historical precedent for 33% decline in professional services from single technology

factors_up.factor: McKinsey using AI agents to replace junior consultant work
Accenture cutting 11k roles tied to AI restructuring
AI tools competitive on many consultant deliverables

factors_down.factor: 33% is an extremely high bar; revenue still growing
Firms pivoting to AI implementation consulting

key_uncertainties: Speed of client willingness to replace consultants with AI
Whether firms successfully pivot to AI-augmented models

update_triggers.up: Major consultancy reports double-digit revenue decline
update_triggers.down: Consulting revenues continue growing despite AI adoption

forecasts.question: Will Labour be largest party at next UK General Election?
forecasts.key_change: Down 1pp: Labour stuck at 18% in polls, Reform leads at 26%, MRP projects Labour falling to 85 seats; 52% want Starmer to resign
forecasts.base_rate: Incumbent governments losing majority ~40% historically; but Labour at 18% is unprecedented low

factors_up.factor: Election 3+ years away, allowing recovery time
Reform may struggle to maintain support as election approaches
FPTP historically favours established parties

factors_down.factor: Labour at 18% in polls, projected to 85 seats
52% of Britons want Starmer to resign
Reform projected at 381 seats with 112-seat majority

key_uncertainties: Whether Labour changes leader before next election
Whether Reform can build viable constituency-level organisation

update_triggers.up: Labour leadership change boosts polls above 25%

forecasts.question: Will AGI be developed before 1 January 2035?
forecasts.key_change: No material change; Metaculus median remains mid-2030, combined forecasts estimate 2031 with wide CI

factors_up.factor: Unprecedented investment in AI labs
Rapid agentic capability deployment in 2025-26
Multiple researchers predict AGI within 3-5 years

factors_down.factor: Definition ambiguity may prevent clear resolution
Regulatory slowdowns or compute bottlenecks possible

key_uncertainties: Whether current paradigm reaches AGI or needs breakthroughs

update_triggers.up: AI consistently outperforms humans on novel reasoning
update_triggers.down: Fundamental capability plateau despite increased compute

forecasts.question: Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 1 January 2030?
forecasts.key_change: Down 1pp: US annual threat assessment says imminent attack unlikely; PLA invasion costs estimated at trillions
forecasts.base_rate: Major power initiating conflict against defended territory: ~2-5% per year

factors_up.factor: 100+ aircraft crossing median line in Dec 2025
Incremental quarantine tactics eroding status quo
Xi consolidation of power reduces internal checks

factors_down.factor: US threat assessment says attack unlikely
PLA could lose 100k+ troops and trillions in costs

key_uncertainties: Whether quarantine escalates to formal blockade

update_triggers.up: Taiwan declares independence or major incident

forecasts.question: Will UK annual CPI inflation fall below 2.0% for at least one month before 1 January 2027?
forecasts.key_change: Down 3pp: Feb CPI at 3.0%, March expected ~3.5% due to Middle East energy disruption; only 9 months remain and inflation trending up
forecasts.base_rate: UK CPI below 2% for only 2 months in last 4 years

factors_up.factor: Global recession could pull demand down
Energy prices could collapse if conflict resolves

factors_down.factor: OECD raised UK inflation forecast to 4.0%

key_uncertainties: Whether BoE rate cuts affect inflation path

forecasts.question: Will Spider-Man: Brand New Day gross over $1.5B worldwide by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: Up 2pp: Trailer hit 1B views in 4 days (historic first); worldwide projections at $2.54B; July 31 release gives 5 months
forecasts.base_rate: No Way Home grossed $1.92B; 3 of last 5 MCU films exceeded $1.5B

factors_up.factor: Trailer hit 1B views in 4 days (historic first)
Industry projections at $2.54B worldwide
Tom Holland/Zendaya at peak star power

key_uncertainties: Global economic conditions affecting international markets

update_triggers.up: Strong early reviews or record advance sales
update_triggers.down: Poor reviews or major competing release

forecasts.question: Will OpenAI and Anthropic have a combined ARR exceeding $70B by 31 December 2026?
forecasts.key_change: Up 2pp: OpenAI at $25B ARR, Anthropic at $19B ARR; combined $44B with strong growth trajectories
forecasts.base_rate: Combined ARR ~$44B (OpenAI $25B + Anthropic $19B); need $26B more in 9 months

factors_up.factor: Anthropic grew $14B to $19B ARR in one month
OpenAI up 17% from year-end in 2 months
Enterprise AI adoption accelerating

factors_down.factor: Both project slower growth rates for 2026

forecasts.question: Will UK average annual real GDP growth exceed 1.5% across the 2030s (2030-2039)?
forecasts.key_change: Down 2pp: OECD cut 2026 UK forecast from 1.2% to 0.7%; Middle East conflict worsening outlook
forecasts.base_rate: UK avg real GDP growth 2010-2019: ~1.7%; post-2016 trend: ~1.2%

factors_up.factor: OBR forecasts 1.6% average 2027-2030
AI productivity gains could boost 2030s growth
Infrastructure investment pipeline

key_uncertainties: Whether AI productivity gains materialize at macro scale
